title: chrysosplenium grayanum var. dickinsii
intro: Chrysosplenium grayanum var. dickinsii, also known as Gray's golden saxifrage, is a plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in East Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Gray's golden saxifrage include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat a variety of health issues.
